name: arl
description: ARL runtime CLI and operations for Codex: manage experiments, warm pools, sessions, logs, and metrics.

interface.shortDescription: Operate ARL experiments, pools, sessions, logs, and metrics.
interface.longDescription: Use ARL skills to inspect, debug, and manage the Agentic RL runtime from Codex, including warm pools, managed sessions, experiment trajectories, gateway health, and runtime metrics.
defaultPrompt: Use $arl-cli to inspect ARL pools and sessions.
Help me debug an ARL session or experiment.
Show me how to export ARL trajectories.
